meta.title: AVI.APP — Task management for accounting offices
meta.description: In-house task-management for accounting offices: a daily task queue, a weekly board, and client management.
common.unexpectedErrorRetry: Something went wrong. Please try again.
language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the interface language. Your choice is saved and applied on this device.
language.label: Interface language
clock.label: Clock
mfaGate.title: Two-factor authentication required
mfaGate.body: The office owner has made two-factor authentication (2FA) mandatory for all team members. To keep using the system you need to set it up. It takes about a minute: scan a QR code with an authenticator app on your phone and enter a one-time code.
bugReport.dialogDesc: Tell us what you ran into. We automatically attach a short technical snapshot (recent errors and actions on screen) so it's easier for us to understand what happened.
bugReport.attemptedAction: What were you trying to do? (optional)
bugReport.attemptedPlaceholder: For example: I tried to save a new task...
bugReport.successToast: Thanks! We've received your report and will look into it.
bugReport.errorToast: Error sending the report — please try again
a11y.title: Accessibility menu
a11y.description: A tool to adjust the display — text size, contrast, font, spacing and more.
a11y.settings.title: Accessibility adjustments
a11y.settings.subtitle: Adjust the display to your needs. Preferences are saved on this device and apply across all screens.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, security and office details
settings.profile.emailHint: Your email is used for identification and sign-in and cannot be changed here.
settings.profile.roleHint: Your role is set and changed on the "Team" screen by an owner or manager.
settings.profile.logoutHint: Sign out of your account on this device.
settings.security.mustDiffer: The new password must be different from the current one
settings.twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
settings.twoFactor.descEnabled: Active — on every sign-in you'll be asked for a code from your authenticator app in addition to your password.
settings.twoFactor.descDisabled: An extra layer of protection for your account: in addition to your password, a one-time code from an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, etc.).
settings.twoFactor.step1: Open the authenticator app on your phone
settings.twoFactor.step2: Scan the QR code (or enter the key manually)
settings.twoFactor.step3: Enter the 6-digit code shown in the app below
settings.twoFactor.qrAlt: QR code for adding the account to your authenticator app
settings.twoFactor.manualKeyHint: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
settings.twoFactor.invalidCodeInline: The code is incorrect or has expired. Codes rotate every 30 seconds.
settings.twoFactor.lostAccess: Lost access to your authenticator app? Contact system support to restore access to your account.
settings.twoFactor.disableConfirmDesc: Your account will be protected by password only. If your office requires two-factor authentication, you'll be asked to re-enable it. If you don't choose, this window will close automatically with no change.
settings.twoFactor.alreadyEnabled: Two-factor authentication is already enabled on this account
settings.twoFactor.invalidCodeToast: The code is incorrect or has expired — try again
settings.twoFactor.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.
settings.office.name: Office name
settings.office.codeHint: This code is used to invite team members and join the office. It cannot be changed.
settings.office.readonlyHint: Only the office owner can edit these details.
settings.mfaPolicy.title: Office security policy
settings.mfaPolicy.description: Require all office members to enable two-factor authentication. Anyone who hasn't yet will see a setup prompt when entering the system, with a link to configure it.
settings.mfaPolicy.toggleLabel: Require two-factor authentication for the whole office
settings.mfaPolicy.enabledToast: Two-factor authentication is now required for the whole office
settings.mfaPolicy.disabledToast: The two-factor authentication requirement has been removed
settings.notifications.emailOnAssignment: Receive an email when a new task is assigned to you.
settings.notifications.bellOnAssignment: Bell notification on new task assignment
settings.notifications.bellOnAssignmentH: When off: the notification still appears in the bell list, but it won't light up the red notification counter (no nudge).
tasks.title: Task queue
tasks.subtitle: Your personal board — New, In progress and Done
tasks.noMatchingFilters: No tasks match the current filters.
tasks.emptyTitle: No tasks in the queue yet
tasks.emptyHint: Create the first task — it will land in the assignee's "New" column.
tasks.form.createDesc: Add a new task to the queue.
tasks.form.dueDateRequired: Select a due date or clear the checkbox
calendar.title: Weekly calendar
calendar.subtitle: All active tasks by due date
calendar.outsideWindow: tasks outside the displayed hours this week.
onboarding.title: Let's finish setting up
onboarding.subtitle: We're missing a detail or two about your office, and then you're in.
onboarding.loginAsOther: Sign in as a different user
onboarding.createdToast: Office created — taking you to the task queue
invite.invitedAsRoleWithEmail: You've been invited to join as {role} with the email
invite.loginOrSignupPrompt: To accept the invitation, sign in with your account — or create a new one.
invite.alreadyHaveAccount: I already have an account — sign in
invite.invitedAsRolePrompt: You've been invited to join as {role}. Click "Accept invitation" to join now.
invite.acceptErrInvalidLinkMsg: The invitation address is missing a token. Make sure you copied the full link from the email.
invite.errTooManyRequestsMsg: Please try again in a few minutes.
invite.acceptErrNotFoundMsg: The link is wrong or the invitation was deleted. Ask your manager to send you a new one.
invite.statusAccepted: The invitation has already been accepted. Try signing in with your account.
invite.statusExpired: The invitation has expired. Ask your manager to send you a new one.
invite.statusRevoked: The invitation was revoked by the manager.
invite.errExpiredMsg: Ask your manager to send you a new one.
invite.emailMismatchWarning: The emails don't match. The invitation will be rejected by the server. Sign out and sign in with the correct email.
invite.alreadyMemberOther: You're already a member of another organization. To accept this invitation, sign out and sign in with the account it was sent to (
invite.logoutRelink: Sign out and sign in again
invite.signupCreateAccountWith: Create a new account with the email
invite.signupErrInvalidLinkMsg: Token missing. Try opening the full link from the email again.
invite.signupErrNotFoundMsg: The link is wrong or the invitation was deleted.
invite.signupErrInactiveMsg: The invitation has already been accepted, expired or revoked. Ask your manager to send you a new one.
invite.signupConfirmToast: We've sent you a confirmation email. Click the link in it to finish joining.
invite.signupCreatedToast: Account created. Continuing to accept the invitation...
invite.signupEmailLocked: The email is fixed by the invitation and can't be changed.
auth.login.title: Log in
auth.login.subtitle: Enter your login details
auth.login.resetSuccess: Your password has been updated. Log in with the new password.
auth.login.pendingPrefix: We've sent a confirmation email to
auth.login.pendingSuffix: Click the link in the email and then you can log in.
auth.signup.title: Open a new office
auth.signup.subtitle: 30 seconds and you're set. No credit card.
auth.signup.confirmToast: We've sent you a confirmation email. Click the link to get started.
auth.signup.createdToast: Account created! Setting up your office...
auth.mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
auth.mfa.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
auth.mfa.invalidToast: The code is wrong or has expired — try again
auth.mfa.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.
auth.mfa.invalidHint: The code is wrong or has expired. Codes rotate every 30 seconds — try the current one.
auth.mfa.signOut: Sign out and return to login
auth.forgot.title: Password recovery
auth.forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgot.genericSuccess: If an account exists with this email, a password reset link has been sent to it.
auth.forgot.checkSpam: Check your inbox, including the spam folder.
auth.reset.title: Set a new password
auth.reset.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.reset.linkExpired: The reset link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.
auth.reset.sameAsCurrent: The new password must be different from the current one
clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Manage your office's clients
clients.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, company number, email or phone
clients.table.name: Name
clients.emptyFiltered: No clients match the current filters.
clients.emptyTitle: No clients in the office yet
clients.emptyHint: Add your first client to start managing details, notes, and future links to tasks.
clients.detail.emptyContacts: No contacts yet. Add the first one.
clients.form.createDesc: Add a new client to your office.
clients.form.name: Name
clients.contact.createDesc: Add a contact to the client.
clients.contact.name: Name
clients.contact.isPrimaryLabel: Primary contact (one per client — selecting this replaces the previous one)
team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Manage the office's staff and their permissions
team.table.name: Name
team.deactivate.confirm: Remove "{name}" from the office? The user won't be able to sign in again until reactivated manually.
team.empty.title: Your office is a one-person shop right now
team.empty.hint: When you invite employees, they'll appear here with their role and status.
team.inviteDialog.title: Invite a member to the team
team.inviteDialog.desc: The invitee will receive an email with a confirmation link. The link is valid for 7 days.
team.inviteDialog.createdNotSent: Invitation created but the email wasn't sent — copy the link and send it manually
team.inviteDialog.copyFailed: Couldn't copy automatically — select the link and copy it manually
team.inviteDialog.failBannerPrefix: ✓ Invitation created, but sending the email to
team.inviteDialog.failBannerSuffix: . Copy the link below and send it manually.
team.inviteDialog.linkHint: If email sending isn't configured (Resend), copy the link and send it directly. Whoever clicks it can sign up or sign in and join the office.
team.inviteDialog.ownerOnlyHint: Only office owners can invite additional managers.
roles.title: Roles and permissions
roles.subtitle: Manage the office's roles and their permissions. System roles are protected and read-only.
roles.confirmDelete: Delete the role "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
roles.table.name: Name
roles.form.duplicateDesc: Copy the permissions from the "{name}" role to a new role.
roles.form.desc: Define the role's name, description, and permission set.
roles.form.name: Name
dashboard.title: Management dashboard
dashboard.truncatedNote: Showing a partial sample of tasks (high volume) — the numbers may be lower than the actual total.
dashboard.kpi.overdueHint: Past due date, not yet completed
dashboard.chart.byStatus.title: Breakdown by status
dashboard.chart.byStatus.subtitle: All active tasks
dashboard.chart.byPriority.title: By priority
dashboard.chart.byMember.title: Load by team member
dashboard.chart.byMember.subtitle: Open tasks (new + in progress)
dashboard.chart.trend.title: Pace — created vs completed
dashboard.chart.trend.subtitle: Last 8 weeks
dashboard.chart.topClients.title: Top clients
dashboard.chart.topClients.subtitle: By number of active tasks
dashboard.trend.aria: Created vs completed over the last 8 weeks
dashboard.noAccess.title: You don't have permission to view the dashboard
dashboard.noAccess.body: The management dashboard is open to the office owner and to team members the owner has granted access. If you think you should have access, contact the office owner.
messages.title: Messages
messages.noDmTargets: No other team members to message privately yet.
messages.emptyThread: No messages yet. Write the first one.
messages.newGroup.title: New group
messages.newGroup.selectedAdminHint: {count} selected · you'll be added as the group admin
messages.manageGroup.confirmDelete: Delete the group "{title}" for all members? This action cannot be undone.
messages.manageGroup.allInGroup: All team members are already in the group.
messages.manageGroup.nonAdminHint: Managing members and the name is reserved for the group admin. You can leave the group at any time.
notifications.bell.title: Notifications
invoicing.title: Accounting
invoicing.emptyNone: No documents yet — issue your first one
invoicing.searchPlaceholder: Search by client name or document number…
invoicing.completeBusinessFirst: Complete the business details before issuing
invoicing.banner.beforeStrong: Before issuing documents you must complete the
invoicing.banner.draftsNote: . You can still save drafts in the meantime.
invoicing.wizard.mismatchWarning: ⚠ The payments total ({payments}) differs from the grand total — they must match before issuing.
invoicing.wizard.buyerRequired: Select a client or enter a client name
invoicing.wizard.lineDiscountTooBig: Line {line}: the discount exceeds the line total
invoicing.wizard.linesRequired: At least one line is required
invoicing.wizard.paymentChequeFields: Payment {payment}: a cheque requires bank, branch, account and cheque number
invoicing.wizard.paymentsRequired: At least one payment is required
invoicing.wizard.paymentsMismatch: In a tax invoice-receipt the payments total ({payments}) must equal the grand total ({total})
invoicing.wizard.savedButIssueFailed: The draft was saved but issuing failed
invoicing.view.cancelledBannerSuffix: . The number is retained and reported as cancelled in exports.
invoicing.view.draftAmountsNote: Draft — the final amounts are computed at issue time.
invoicing.view.deliveredHint: The original was delivered · additional downloads are marked "Copy"
invoicing.view.creditDraftCreated: A credit-note draft was created — review and issue it
invoicing.view.cancelDialogBody: Cancellation is possible only while the document has not been delivered to the client. The number is retained and the document will be reported as cancelled. If the document was already delivered, issue a credit invoice instead.
invoicing.settings.title: Business details
invoicing.settings.subtitle: The legal identity printed on tax documents (invoices, receipts and credit notes).
invoicing.settings.readyBanner: The business details are complete — documents can be issued for this business.
invoicing.settings.notReadyBeforeStrong: To issue documents you must fill in the
invoicing.settings.notReadyAfterStrong: (9 digits) and the official business name. Until then, invoices/receipts cannot be issued.
invoicing.settings.legalNameHint: As registered with the authorities — printed on the documents.
invoicing.settings.paturHint: An exempt dealer issues documents without VAT.
invoicing.settings.readonlyHint: Only the office owner can edit the business details.
invoicing.settings.legalNameRequired: The official business name is required
invoicing.settings.businessIdInvalid: The business ID must be exactly 9 digits
reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Sales and receipts books, VAT summary and client balances — by date range
reports.errors.invalidRange: The start date is after the end date — fix the range.
reports.errors.rangeTooLarge: The selected range is too large — narrow the date range.
reports.errors.loadFailed: Failed to load the reports. Please try again.
reports.openformat.cardDesc: Generates INI.TXT + BKMVDATA.TXT per the Income Tax instructions (version 1.31) for the selected range — for an audit, for the auditing accountant, or for validation in the Tax Authority simulator.
reports.openformat.errors.businessIdMiss: The business ID is missing from the business profile — complete it in the accounting settings and try again.
reports.openformat.errors.forbidden: The unified-format export is available to the office owner only.
reports.openformat.errors.prepareFailed: Failed to prepare the export. Please try again.
reports.openformat.downloadNote: The download is a single ZIP with the official folder tree (INI.TXT + BKMVDATA.zip) plus an extraction instructions page. This report can be printed — it is the required output at the end of every production run (Appendix 4 of the instructions). The range includes {count} documents.
reports.emptyRange: No data in the selected range
reports.summary.title: Document summary by type
reports.summary.subtitle: The verification report required for registration (section 2.6 of the instructions) — count and amount for every official document type
reports.summary.foot: Cancelled documents are counted in the quantity but excluded from the amount. Types not managed in the software are shown as zero — as required by the instructions.
reports.salesBook.subtitle: Tax invoices, tax invoice-receipts and credit notes — chronological
reports.salesBook.foot: Cancelled rows remain in the book (marked) but are not summed; credit notes are shown as negative and subtracted from the totals.
reports.receiptsBook.subtitle: One receipt row per payment method (receipts and tax invoice-receipts)
reports.receiptsBook.footWithholding: In addition, {amount} was withheld at source (documented on the receipts).
reports.receiptsBook.footMultiPayment: A receipt with several payments shows one row per payment — exactly as in the unified-format file.
reports.vat.title: Output VAT summary
reports.vat.subtitle: Monthly rollup — sales, credits and net
reports.vat.foot: Informational, in support of the periodic filing — it does not replace the official VAT return. An exempt dealer will see zero VAT here.
reports.balances.subtitle: Charges vs receipts for each client in the range — informational
reports.balances.foot: A positive balance = the client has not yet paid the full charges in the range. Sorted from highest balance to lowest.
